# Open the provided file and read raw text
path = "/mnt/data/file-1DkvWTFnosLhk9WouC8Zkk-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:500], len(raw)

import re, json, textwrap, itertools, unicodedata
raw = open("/mnt/data/file-1DkvWTFnosLhk9WouC8Zkk-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

# Find all substrings within Arabic quotes "..." and within ﴿...﴾, and also ones after cues without quotes.
spans = []

# Helper to add span after trimming punctuation/quotes per rule
def add_span(text, start, end, typ):
    # trim edge spaces and punctuation/quotes
    trim_chars = ' \n\r\t"' + "«»'“”()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ"
    while start<end and raw[start] in trim_chars:
        start += 1
    while end>start and raw[end-1] in trim_chars:
        end -= 1
    span_text = raw[start:end]
    # verify
    if raw[start:end] != span_text:
        pass
    spans.append((start,end,span_text,typ))

# 1) quoted with straight quotes
for m in re.finditer(r'["“](.+?)["”]', raw, flags=re.DOTALL):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    start = m.start(1); end = m.end(1)
    # Determine type via surrounding cues within ±64
    pre = raw[max(0,start-100):start]
    post = raw[end:end+100]
    typ = None
    if re.search(r'(قال رسول الله|النبي|حديث|رواه|ﷺ)', pre):
        typ = "Hadith"
    if re.search(r'(قال الله|يقول الله|سورة|الآية|قال تعالى|القرآن|﴿)', pre) or re.search(r'﴾', post):
        # prefer Aya if clear
        typ = "Aya" if typ is None or "قال الله" in pre or "قال تعالى" in pre or "سورة" in pre or "الآية" in pre or "القرآن" in pre else typ
        # but leave hadith if earlier decided hadith
    if typ:
        add_span(raw, start, end, typ)

# 2) content within ﴿...﴾
for m in re.finditer(r'﴿(.*?)﴾', raw, flags=re.DOTALL):
    start = m.start(1); end = m.end(1)
    add_span(raw, start, end, "Aya")

# 3) Also explicit unquoted hadith in [3]: "أفضل الكسب ..." appears without quotes
# Search occurrences of that phrase and mark as hadith
targets = [
    "أفضل الكسب عمل الرجل بيده وكل بيع مبرور",
    "لأن يأخذ أحدكم حبله، فيأتي بحزمة الحطب على ظهره، فيبيعها، فيكف الله بها وجهه، خير له من أن يسأل الناس، أعطوه أو منعوه",
    "ثلاث فيهنّ البركة: البيع إلى أجل، والمقارضة، وخلط البُرّ بالشعير للبيت لا للبيع",
]
for t in targets:
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(t), raw):
        add_span(raw, m.start(), m.end(), "Hadith")

len(spans), spans[:5]
